SPECIALIST EXTENSION ACCESS

Extension Scaffolding

Professional scaffolding designs for single and double-storey extensions. Secure, high-level platforms for bricklaying, roofing, and structural work.

Building Your Dream Home

House extensions are one of the most common residential projects. They require scaffolding that provides safe access for bricklayers, roofers, and carpenters, often involving loading bays for heavy building materials.

Extension Scaffolding Solutions:

  • 🏢 **Loading Platforms**: Reinforced decks for bricks, blocks, and timber.
  • 🏠 **Wrap-Around Access**: Continuous platforms around the new structure for seamless work.
  • 📍 **Safety Rails & Netting**: Full fall protection for all tradespeople.
  • 📜 **Staircase Towers**: Safe internal or external access to the extension's new floor.

Ideal For:

  • • Single-Storey Rear Extensions
  • • Double-Storey Side Extensions
  • • Kitchen Extensions
  • • Garage Conversions
  • • Full Loft & Extension Combos
Get an Extension Quote

Trusted by Extension Builders

We work closely with local building contractors and homeowners to provide the exact specifications required for a safe and efficient extension build.

High Loading

Calculated to handle the weight of bricks, blocks, and heavy construction equipment.

Full Safety

Complete fall protection including netting and double handrails.
